gaps_we_deliberately_leave_open: llms-full.txt extended guide — our single llms.txt (59 lines) covers full methodology without drift risk.
ai_manifest.json agent_rules block — AI-steering pattern we explicitly reject; our llms.txt is descriptive, not instructional.
12 JSON/CSV API endpoints — we have no consumer; ClaimReview JSON-LD is sufficient structured data.
review-response.html 'Strawman Control' page — meta-critique leads to infinite regress.
daily synthetic self-review JSON — content flood we should not replicate.

gap_analysis.our_current_advantage: Structural: brandable short URL (funwithscience.net/dome-model-review/), SEO meta tags, ClaimReview JSON-LD, apex umbrella landing, GitHub repo metadata (description/topics), honest descriptive llms.txt. Dome still has null repo metadata and has made no search-engine submission move — our indexing ceiling is higher once operator-hand items unlock.
